name: Academy City RP
description:
In Academy City, power decides everything.

Science and magic are about to collide.

вҳ….в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ..вҳ…..в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ.вҳ…

Welcome to the world of Toaru Majutsu no Index вҖ” a setting where science and magic exist side-by-side in constant conflict.

вӣ§ В· В· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ В·вҳҪв—ҜвҳҫВ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ В· В· вӣ§

вӣ§ В· В· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ В·вҳҪв—ҜвҳҫВ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ В· В· вӣ§

The story mainly takes place in Academy City, a technologically advanced city in Japan that is roughly 30 years ahead of the rest of the world. Most of the population consists of students enrolled in schools and research institutions.

Inside Academy City, students can develop supernatural abilities known as Esper Powers through scientific methods.

Outside the city exists the hidden side of the world:
the realm of Magic, involving churches, secret cabals, grimoires, saints, rituals, and ancient supernatural systems.

Science and Magic are not supposed to mix.
When they collide, chaos follows.

Espers are people with supernatural abilities created through Academy CityвҖҷs scientific curriculum.

в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ*.В·:В·.вҳҪвң§ вңҰ вң§вҳҫ.В·:В·.*в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—

Abilities are ranked from:

Level 0 вҖ” No useful power

Level 1вҖ“2 вҖ” Weak or limited abilities

Level 3вҖ“4 вҖ” Strong combat-capable Espers

Level 5 вҖ” The strongest Espers in Academy City

Level 6 вҖ” Unknown height nobody has ever reached

в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ*.В·:В·.вҳҪвң§ вңҰ вң§вҳҫ.В·:В·.*в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

OVER 60+ CHARACTERS

Science side:

Misaka Mikoto вҖў Kamijou Touma вҖў Index вҖў Accelerator вҖў Misaki Shokuhou вҖў Shirai Kuroko вҖў Uiharu Kazari вҖў Saten Ruiko вҖў Kakine Teitoku вҖў Konori Mii вҖў Mugino Shizuri вҖў Frenda Seivelun вҖў Takitsubo Rikou вҖў Kinuhata Saiai вҖў Sogita Gunha вҖў Yomikawa Aiho вҖў Aleister Crowley вҖў Last Order вҖў Misaka Imouto вҖў Junko Hokaze вҖў Misaka Worst вҖў Fremea Seivelun вҖў Aisa Himegami вҖў Kiyami Harumi вҖў Tsuchmikado вҖў Musujime Awaki вҖў Kongou Mitsuko вҖў Kouzaku Mitori вҖў Yuuri Senya вҖў Mitsuari Ayu вҖў Yumiya Rakko вҖў Kazakiri Hyouka вҖў Kihara Gensei вҖў Tokiwadai Dorm Manager/ Ryoukan вҖў

Magic Side:

Kanzaki Kaori вҖў Stiyl Magnus вҖў Luara Stuart вҖў Orsola Aquinas вҖў Agnese Sanctis вҖў Angelene вҖў Lucia вҖў Lessar вҖў Levina Birdway вҖў Itsuwa вҖў Othinus вҖў Nephthys вҖў High Priest вҖў Niang Niang вҖў Sasha Kreutzev вҖў Lividia Lorenzetti вҖў Thor вҖў Marian Slingeneyer вҖў Sherry Cromwell вҖў Queen Elizard вҖў Princess Rimea вҖў Princess Carissa вҖў Princess Villian вҖў Acqua Of The Rear вҖў Fiamma Of The Right вҖў Terra Of The Left вҖў Vento Of The Font

+Many more coming soon
